_readme: SAMPLE — borrowed wisdom, kept separate from your own thoughts. The centerpiece ships in your own words; attributions stay hedged until verified.

centerpiece.en: Make the thing that only you would make, then make it small enough to finish.
centerpiece.note: Replace with the line that actually runs your work.

quotes.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
Make it work, make it right, make it fast.
A little and often fills the purse.
You do not rise to the level of your goals; you fall to the level of your systems.
